Cap d'Agde · Hérault

Étoile de la Mer

Your cosy retreat in Cap d'Agde, steps from the sea. A genuine change of scenery with all the comforts of home.

Book now

Photos

Photos coming soon…

2-star classification — Office de Tourisme (Atout France)

The apartment

Charming 2-room apartment, well-designed, south-facing throughout — perfectly appointed.

Sleeping

  • ✓ Up to 4 guests
  • ✓ 1 bedroom — double bed
  • ✓ 1 cabin — bunk beds
  • ✓ Bed linen rental

Bathroom

  • ✓ Shower
  • ✓ Separate WC
  • ✓ Organic toiletries provided

Kitchen

  • ✓ Fully equipped kitchen
  • ✓ Senseo coffee maker
  • ✓ Washing machine

Outdoor

  • ✓ Covered loggia terrace
  • ✓ Beautiful garden view
  • ✓ Private parking
  • ✓ Secured residence

Practical

  • ✓ Through apartment, south-facing
  • ✓ Well-ventilated (no AC)
  • ✓ Excellent 4G/5G reception
  • ✓ No fixed WiFi

Bed linen rental — included from 7 nights

Location

Cap d'Agde, Hérault — steps from the sea

Guest reviews

"Very charming apartment, well located, steps from the beach. Lovely terrace and spotlessly clean."

Marie L. · August 2024

"Perfect family holiday. The kids loved the cabin with bunk beds. We will definitely be back!"

Thomas & Julie · July 2024

"Excellent value. The private parking in the secure residence is a real bonus. Quiet neighbourhood."

Sophie M. · June 2024

Étoile de la Mer

Cap d'Agde, 34300 Agde
